Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are asked to produce a response from the perspective of an LLM that is given a prompt The prompt describes a scenario a database context a temporal profile model with anomalies and asks the LLM to 1 identify anomalies 2 generate hypotheses 3 propose verification SQL queries

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The LLM must not reference the instructions or explanations above and should present the anomalies reasons and queries independently

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Ill outline anomalies from the temporal profile model

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: R to P low STDEV 1 hour compared to avg 25 hours indicating highly consistent timing possibly automated or batched approval

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: P to N avg 7 days high STDEV 2 days long and variable delay between approval and notification suggesting notification backlog

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: A to C avg 2 hours which is very quick from assign to close implying premature closure or missing steps

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: E to N avg 5 min very quick maybe unrealistic possibly skipping intermediate validation

Name: Validation - IND
Text: Also note No explicit anomaly for R to E 1 day avg 8h stdev or A to C 2h 1h stdev but the latter is suspicious because close after assign with no evaluate approve The model doesnt account for process sequence entirely but the anomalies point out

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Ill generate hypotheses automation manual delays resource bottlenecks premature closure due to fraud or errors poor integration between systems etc

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: SQL queries Ill craft queries to find claims with unusual timings

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: For each anomaly Ill propose a query using CTEs or subqueries to compute time differences between activities for the same claim_id

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Ill include checks like time between R and P with very low variance time between P and N greater than threshold time between A and C where evaluate approve missing time between E and N less than threshold

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Ill also suggest grouping by adjuster claim_type region to find correlations

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: I need to present the response without referencing the prompt instructions Ill craft a clear answer with sections Anomalies Identified Hypotheses on Causes Verification SQL Queries
